Settings application and modules for Pebble firmware, including menu, Bluetooth, display, notifications, and system settings.


## Files
- **[settings.c](settings.c.md)**: Implements the settings application for Pebble firmware, including menu and window management.
- **[settings.h](settings.h.md)**: Declares a function to retrieve application information in the Pebble firmware.
- **[settings_activity_tracker.c](settings_activity_tracker.c.md)**: Implements a settings activity tracker for managing background apps in the Pebble firmware.
- **[settings_activity_tracker.h](settings_activity_tracker.h.md)**: Header file for retrieving metadata of the activity tracker settings module.
- **[settings_bluetooth.c](settings_bluetooth.c.md)**: Manages Bluetooth settings, including toggling airplane mode, handling remote devices, and updating UI elements.
- **[settings_bluetooth.h](settings_bluetooth.h.md)**: Defines data structures and functions for managing Bluetooth settings and connections.
- **[settings_certifications.h](settings_certifications.h.md)**: Defines structures and functions for managing regulatory flags and certification IDs for various platforms.
- **[settings_display.c](settings_display.c.md)**: Manages display settings, including backlight intensity, timeout, and language options.
- **[settings_display.h](settings_display.h.md)**: Defines a function to get metadata for the settings display module.
- **[settings_display_calibration.c](settings_display_calibration.c.md)**: Implements display calibration settings for the Spalding platform, including UI and interaction logic.
- **[settings_display_calibration.h](settings_display_calibration.h.md)**: Declares a function to push display calibration settings onto a window stack.
- **[settings_factory_reset.c](settings_factory_reset.c.md)**: Implements a user interface for confirming and executing a factory reset on a Pebble device.
- **[settings_factory_reset.h](settings_factory_reset.h.md)**: Declares a function to push the settings factory reset window in the Pebble firmware.
- **[settings_menu.c](settings_menu.c.md)**: Manages settings menu functionality, including submodule metadata retrieval and window management.
- **[settings_menu.h](settings_menu.h.md)**: Defines the settings menu structure, callbacks, and functions for managing menu items in Pebble firmware.
- **[settings_notifications.c](settings_notifications.c.md)**: Manages notification settings, including alert filters, vibration intensity, text size, and window timeout.
- **[settings_notifications.h](settings_notifications.h.md)**: Header file for retrieving metadata information about notification settings.
- **[settings_notifications_private.h](settings_notifications_private.h.md)**: Defines and converts between `SettingsContentSize` and `PreferredContentSize` enums.
- **[settings_option_menu.c](settings_option_menu.c.md)**: Implements functions for creating and managing a settings option menu in the Pebble firmware.
- **[settings_option_menu.h](settings_option_menu.h.md)**: Defines structures and functions for creating and managing settings option menus in the firmware.
- **[settings_quick_launch.c](settings_quick_launch.c.md)**: Displays and manages the Quick Launch menu in the settings, allowing app selection and enabling features.
- **[settings_quick_launch.h](settings_quick_launch.h.md)**: Header file for retrieving metadata of the quick launch settings module.
- **[settings_quick_launch_app_menu.c](settings_quick_launch_app_menu.c.md)**: Generates a menu for selecting a quicklaunch app, filtering out watchfaces and hidden apps.
- **[settings_quick_launch_app_menu.h](settings_quick_launch_app_menu.h.md)**: Declares a function to push the quick launch app menu window using a specified button ID.
- **[settings_quick_launch_setup_menu.c](settings_quick_launch_setup_menu.c.md)**: Displays the initial Quick Launch setup menu for configuring long press actions on a Pebble watch.
- **[settings_quick_launch_setup_menu.h](settings_quick_launch_setup_menu.h.md)**: Header file for quick launch setup menu, including function to get app info.
- **[settings_quiet_time.c](settings_quiet_time.c.md)**: Implements the "Quiet Time" settings module for managing Do Not Disturb schedules and notifications.
- **[settings_quiet_time.h](settings_quiet_time.h.md)**: Defines a function to retrieve metadata for the quiet time settings module.
- **[settings_remote.c](settings_remote.c.md)**: Manages Bluetooth remote settings, including pairing and heart rate sharing options.
- **[settings_remote.h](settings_remote.h.md)**: Function to push a remote settings menu using Bluetooth data and stored remote information.
- **[settings_system.c](settings_system.c.md)**: Implements system settings functionality, including information display, certification management, and shutdown options for Pebble firmware.
- **[settings_system.h](settings_system.h.md)**: Header file for retrieving system settings module metadata.
- **[settings_time.c](settings_time.c.md)**: Manages date and time settings, including timezone and format configuration for the Pebble firmware.
- **[settings_time.h](settings_time.h.md)**: Header file for retrieving metadata information of the time settings module.
- **[settings_timeline.c](settings_timeline.c.md)**: Implements settings and user interface for managing Timeline Quick View features in Pebble firmware.
- **[settings_timeline.h](settings_timeline.h.md)**: Declares a function to get metadata information for the settings timeline module.
- **[settings_vibe_patterns.c](settings_vibe_patterns.c.md)**: Implements vibration pattern settings for notifications, phone calls, alarms, and system events.
- **[settings_vibe_patterns.h](settings_vibe_patterns.h.md)**: Defines a function to retrieve metadata for vibration patterns in settings.
- **[settings_window.c](settings_window.c.md)**: Implements a settings window for managing various system settings categories with menu navigation.
- **[settings_window.h](settings_window.h.md)**: Functions to create and destroy a settings window with specified menu items and callbacks.
